canonical_answer: Several white plastic bottles with red and black labels are arranged on the left side of the frame against a white background. The text 'Non-repellent' appears in large black font on the right side of the screen. A man wearing glasses and a light blue polo shirt stands nearby with hands clasped in front of his waist.

question: Describe the sequence of text overlays and graphics displayed throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 4s, text reading 'Dance Your Way' is visible near the man; at 6s, the text changes to 'DanceSportCenter' on screen; at 10s, 'Subterranean termites' appears alongside winged insects; at 18s, red text 'TO TREAT' is added diagonally above the previous text.

question: Describe the visual changes regarding the man's clothing and the insect illustrations over time.
canonical_answer: At 4s, a man in a grey polo shirt with a microphone stands against white; at 8s, he wears a blue polo while five winged insects appear; at 10s, six insects are shown with radiating lines; at 16s, the man clasps his hands together in front of his chest.
